tools.name: search_schematics
tools.description: Search CreateMod.com for Minecraft Create Mod schematics. Returns matching builds with title, page URL, rating and stats. Send users to the page URL; never fetch .nbt schematic files.

tools.name: get_schematic
tools.description: Get details about one schematic by its URL slug: description, author, rating, versions, required mods, video. The schematic file itself is not available to agents; direct users to the page URL.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_schematics, get_schematic · Private data: search_schematics, get_schematic · Public sink: search_schematics.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_schematics, get_schematic · Private data: search_schematics, get_schematic · Public sink: search_schematics

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
